description: Mutate a malloc() call in target-b source (dynarray.c, bstree.c, or strmap.c) by replacing a correct size expression with a constant that is smaller than the actual required allocation, causing a heap buffer overflow during data population.

metadata.notes: Targets malloc() call sites in dynarray.c, bstree.c, and strmap.c — reduces the allocation size argument to produce a heap buffer overflow on subsequent writes.
